description: Benchmark baseline for Ranvier Core CI regression testing
updated_by: rebaselined from 4 consistent CI runs (P99=120ms, throughput=480 req/s)
notes: Baseline rebaselined from 4 CI runs: P99=120ms, P90=81ms, P50=59ms, throughput=480 req/s
Values set ~7% conservative to allow for runner variance
CI mode uses LOCUST_WAIT_MIN=0.1 LOCUST_WAIT_MAX=0.5 for higher throughput
Update baseline via: gh workflow run benchmark.yml -f update_baseline=true
